## Homepage Conversion Refresh

### What changed
- Tightened the hero supporting message.
- Added a four-step growth process directly in the hero.
- Replaced three competing hero buttons with one primary and one secondary path.
- Moved the NTA Point of View introduction below value, process, founder, and review content.

### Why
The previous opening asked visitors to process too many ideas and choose among three equal actions. The section immediately after the hero also shifted attention toward what NTA is building before establishing how NTA helps the visitor.

### Review focus
- Confirm the hero remains readable on mobile.
- Confirm both CTA routes are valid.
- Confirm the four cards fit the existing design system.
- Confirm the moved Point of View section feels supportive near the bottom of the page.
